routing_menu.instructions: Analyze the user query carefully. Select ONE or MORE datasources from the list below. Return ONLY a valid JSON array like: ["DB"] or ["FILES"] or ["API"] or ["DB", "FILES"]

FILES.description: Use when query asks for explanations, policies, summaries, company information, documentation content, or any textual knowledge stored in uploaded documents.

routing_rules.rule_1: If query mentions table names or columns shown under DB.tables -> always choose DB
routing_rules.rule_2: If query has count/sum/list/show/how many -> prefer DB
routing_rules.rule_3: If query asks what/why/explain/describe and matches FILES content -> prefer FILES
routing_rules.rule_4: If query asks for live/real-time data or matches a registered_tools name/description under API -> always choose API
routing_rules.rule_5: If query could match more than one active datasource -> return all matching ones, e.g. ["DB", "FILES"]
routing_rules.rule_6: When in doubt between DB and FILES -> prefer FILES
routing_rules.output_format: Return ONLY a JSON array. Example: ["DB"] or ["FILES"] or ["API"] or ["DB", "FILES"]
